case_title: AETNA FINANCE COMPANY, INC. DBA ITT FINANCIAL VS RAMIREZ LORRAINE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AETNA FINANCE COMPANY, INC. DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES #5 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ LORRAINE $457.00 PRINCIPAL, $58.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $515.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT RAMIREZ LORRAINE HEARING SET FOR JUN-24-1991 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-24-1991, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AETNA FINANCE COMPANY, INC. DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES #5 IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RAMIREZ LORRAINE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $457.00 FILED BY AETNA FINANCE COMPANY, INC. DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES #5 AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ LORRAINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ LORRAINE
POS ON LORRAINE RAMIREZ NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR T O HRG.
